name: Dream Island (no, not that one)
description:
⚠️ ALL CHARACTERS DEPICTED ARE 18 AND OVER! ⚠️

"Welcome to your new island life. We hope you enjoy your stay."

It's been a while since I made a bot, huh? Well, today, this bot is based on my Tomodachi life island! Meet 21 other quirky residents of the island! (You are the 22nd.) How many friends (or enemies) will you make? Only YOU can decide! With that out of the way, let's meet the cast!

UPDATE 1: New characters and a new intro have been added! And relationships have changed.

  1. Yuno Wattson (OC)

  2. Two (BFDI)

  10. Firey (BFDI)

  11. Ice Cube (BFDI)

  13. Marlo (OC)

  14. Ludacar (OC)

  15. Hannah (OC)

  16. Ursula (OC, not to be confused with the Disney villain)

  17. Jumbo Josh (Garten of Banban)

  18. Playtime (Baldi's Basics)
